---
title: "Project_v2"
author: "Patrick Torralba"
format: html
toc: true
  toc-float: true
editor: visual
---

# Research Question: Is the running location statistically significant? Does the running location affect Patrick's distance and mile time?

# Set-up


## Load libraries and data
```{r}
#| label: library

library(tidyverse)

```

Load running data
```{r}
#| label: running-data
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false

url <- "https://ac99290b-5f34-47fc-8a68-12df7cf8882c.usrfiles.com/ugd/4f27c5_1945c1c7da814fff9505e1242df146db.txt"


raw_lines <- read_lines(url)

## only extract where the data begins
clean_lines <- raw_lines[7:263] 

## read lines as a table
run_df <- read_table(clean_lines,
                     col_names = c("Place","Division Ranking","Number", "Full Name", "Age", "Sex", "City", "State", "Time", "Pace"))
```
